findings.title: Army Sustainment Command FY26 Logistics Modernization Strategy
findings.snippet: ASC announces expanded investment in logistics automation and sustainment services for FY26, with emphasis on predictive maintenance, supply chain visibility, and field service engineering across CONUS and OCONUS installations.

findings.title: DLA Spending Trends Q1 FY26 — Logistics Services
findings.snippet: Defense Logistics Agency reports 12% increase in logistics services obligations for Q1 FY26, driven by Army sustainment modernization programs and increased field service requirements at installations supporting Pacific theater operations.

findings.title: RS3 Vehicle Task Order Pipeline Update
findings.snippet: Army Contracting Command releases updated RS3 task order forecast for remainder of FY26, including 8 new requirements in logistics sustainment, systems engineering, and training support services.

output.summary: Research confirms strong market signals for Army logistics sustainment services in FY26. ASC is expanding investment in logistics modernization, DLA spending in logistics services is up 12%, and the RS3 vehicle has 8 new task orders forecast. This validates Envision's positioning in the Army sustainment market.
